title: encyclia aspera
intro: Encyclia aspera, also known as the rough-encyclia or rough-encyclia orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Encyclia aspera are said to include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues, among others. Encyclia aspera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
